text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With another year under her belt, Narita Brian
will be entering races as a senior this year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm reviewing last year's training and planning
her new schedule...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Swish...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like something came in through the
window. I look in the direction of the sound,
and...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. I figured you were here since one of the
windows was open... Guess I was right on the
mark.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tossing that letter in was the right choice.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I was sitting under the kotatsu at my parents'
place when your face came to mind...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
So I decided to drop by on my way home from the
gym. Then I saw your window open. That's all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Come on, we don't have time for this. Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...It's starting!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We're here at the New Year's special exhibition
race! Coming around the fourth corner, all sixteen
racers are grouped together!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Who will take the first prize of the New Year? It
looks like someone is steadily breaking away from
the pack!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Go! Pass 'em!
Keep going! You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What? You don't like it?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Check out the leader! That's pretty good form. If
she keeps this up... she's gonna take it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Haha, just like I thought.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: All right, I'm going home.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I went to the gym and watched a race. That's all I
had planned for today.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
If I don't go home soon, my mom's going to start
nagging about how I should be using my New
Year's break to rest.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Still, it's fortunate you happened to be around so
we could watch the race together.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I know classes and training will start in a few days
and we'll see each other a lot, but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, I wanted to see you sooner this
year.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...All right.
choice_data_list: Today was a nice change of pace.

Hope you're looking forward to the year's first
training session!
I'll work hard to meet your expectations.
I'll work hard to meet your expectations.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...All right.
choice_data_list: Today was a nice change of pace.

Hope you're looking forward to the year's first
training session!
I'll work hard to meet your expectations.
I'll work hard to meet your expectations.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Is that right?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I feel the same. Anyway, see ya.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian heads toward the station with a slight
spring in her step.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I definitely am. Can't go wrong with your
training.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I should run home to keep myself sharp.
It's only about—
choice_data_list: That's probably not a good idea.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hm. You think so?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian reluctantly promises to wait until
after the New Year holiday to start her training.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...You don't have to be so serious.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: But, I am expecting great things.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You're expecting the same of me after all, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, we end up watching one more race
together before going home.
